title: Shapes Adventure: Circle, Square, Triangle
description: A simple coloring page featuring basic shapes for young learners to identify, color, and enjoy while developing shape recognition skills.
instructions: Color each shape using your favorite colors. Try to use a different color for each shape!

content.image: A friendly scene with a large smiling sun (circle) in the top corner, a house made from a square with a triangle roof, and flowers with circle centers and triangle petals. Each shape is clearly outlined with bold black lines for easy coloring.

elements.name: Circle Sun
elements.description: Color the big circle sun yellow or orange

elements.name: Square House
elements.description: Color the square part of the house red, blue, or brown

elements.name: Triangle Roof
elements.description: Color the triangle roof green or purple

elements.name: Circle Flower Centers
elements.description: Color the small circles in the flowers yellow

elements.name: Triangle Petals
elements.description: Color the triangle petals pink, red, or orange

learningFacts: A circle is round and has no corners
A square has 4 equal sides and 4 corners
A triangle has 3 sides and 3 corners
Shapes are all around us in everyday objects
